use_cases: Dynamic hero section background with animated rainbow visuals
Landing page visual accent with immersive shader effects
Interactive background element for creative portfolios
Eye-catching visual layer for multimedia presentations
ai_summary: A React component that renders an animated rainbow matrix shader using UnicornScene. The component automatically adapts to window dimensions and serves as a visually immersive canvas for hero sections, backgrounds, or creative visual effects. It provides continuous animated visuals suitable for creative industries and multimedia applications.
